nameMeanings.name: Amerike
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Amrein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Benno, Hans Peter, Kurt.
South German, chiefly Swiss German: topographic name from am ‘at’ + Rain ‘edge of plowed land’.
German: altered form of   Amrhein  . Compare   Amerine   and   Amrine  .

nameMeanings.name: Meryk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Recent coinage, associated chiefly with the American actress  Meryl Streep  (  b. 1949  as  Mary Louise Streep ).

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Meryk Amerike was born in 1405, in Long Ashton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She married Meryk Amerike in 1425, in Long Ashton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ko.Long Ashton, , Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 서머세트 론그 애슈턴
ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Meryk Amerike(은)는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 론그 애슈턴에서 Meryk Amerike(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
